title: Purple Mod

# What do this mod do?
If u waited for Minecraft: End Update, this mod is for u! This mod adds new ore, ingot and blocks! There are screenshot below.  
**DISCLAIMER: This mod in development! There can be some bugs!**  
 
## Endernite Ingot
![Endernite Ingot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/56e3eeaf9135588cb68b5a78cf715ab8e2d125dd.png)

![Endernite Ore and Picxaxe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3614f9b228ec0e66040a082f1731c52f821c1db1.png)
